summary: Phase 4 production-readiness verified. Backend: payments/config returns razorpay_enabled:false correctly; razorpay/create-order returns 503 with helpful message when authed and no keys; admin login returns must_change_password:true initially, PUT /api/admin/profile with new_password clears flag, re-login confirms must_change_password:false; checkout COD+TRIBAL10 succeeds end-to-end (email scaffold gracefully skipped); regression endpoints (products, cart, wishlist, admin/orders) all pass. Frontend: /auth login, /admin loads, all key testids (admin-dashboard-section, admin-tab-profile, admin-tab-products) present; dashboard stats render (Revenue ₹5,475.4, 4 orders, 13 customers, 9 products); mobile-menu-toggle works at 390x844.
passed: Admin login returns is_admin:true, must_change_password:true on first call
PUT /api/admin/profile {new_password} returns {ok:true}; subsequent login returns must_change_password:false
POST /api/checkout COD + TRIBAL10 -> order HKV20260628184733 created (email send skipped without breaking order)
Frontend /auth login -> /admin loads without JS errors
Mobile mobile-menu-toggle present and opens nav drawer at 390x844
notes: Could not visually verify auto-switch to Profile tab + warning toast on first admin login because backend PUT /api/admin/profile test ran earlier in same iteration cleared must_change_password flag. The logic itself is verified via API (flag toggles correctly true->false). To retest UI flow, reset admin password to default via /api/auth/forgot-password and reload /admin.
Razorpay & Resend integrations are MOCKED/SCAFFOLDED — no real keys in /app/backend/.env (intentional per problem statement).
